channel.title: Recognitions on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Recognitions
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Awards Letter of Appreciation from DOT, TEC India 2026 ☞ More Details Awards Indian Achiever’s Awards 2022 ☞ More Details Recognitions NITK Alumni Recognition ☞ Patent#11,988,832 B2 ☞ Patent#12,081,729 B2 Judge at Smart India Hackathon ☞ More Details ☞ More events like this Guest Lecture at NIT Calicut ☞ More Details ☞ More events like this Guest Lecture at DesignersX ☞ More Details ☞ More events like this Coverage
